resv|ample|few|llm:qwen2.5:14b.justification: Moderate incoming prod jobs warrant some idle headroom while avoiding GPU starvation.

resv|ample|few|llm:qwen2.5:3b.justification: Contention is low, but prod jobs are still incoming; reserving light headroom can protect future jobs without harming current workload.

resv|ample|many|llm:qwen2.5:14b.justification: Ample contention with many incoming prod jobs justifies heavy reservation to protect future high-priority tasks.

resv|ample|many|llm:qwen2.5:3b.justification: Contention is low, but prod jobs are still incoming; reserving light headroom can protect future jobs without harming current workload.

resv|ample|none|llm:qwen2.5:14b.justification: No incoming prod jobs means no need to protect idle GPUs.

resv|ample|none|llm:qwen2.5:3b.justification: Contention is low, and no prod jobs are incoming; reserving headroom would not benefit the current workload.

resv|moderate|few|llm:qwen2.5:14b.justification: Moderate contention with a few incoming prod jobs suggests reserving some headroom to protect future high-priority tasks without overly impacting current workload.

resv|moderate|few|llm:qwen2.5:3b.justification: Moderate cluster contention warrants reserving light headroom to protect incoming high-priority jobs without significantly impacting existing workload.

resv|moderate|many|llm:qwen2.5:14b.justification: Moderate contention with many incoming prod jobs necessitates some idle headroom to protect future high-priority tasks without overly impacting current workload.

resv|moderate|many|llm:qwen2.5:3b.justification: Moderate contention allows reserving light headroom to protect incoming prod jobs without significantly impacting existing workload.

resv|moderate|none|llm:qwen2.5:14b.justification: No incoming prod jobs means no need to protect idle GPUs.

resv|moderate|none|llm:qwen2.5:3b.justification: Moderate contention exists, but no prod jobs are incoming; reserving light headroom will prevent future shortages without harming current job performance.

resv|scarce|few|llm:qwen2.5:14b.justification: Reserving GPUs would starve current waiting jobs given the scarcity.

resv|scarce|few|llm:qwen2.5:3b.justification: Contention is currently low, but prod jobs are still incoming; reserving light headroom will help protect against future high-demand scenarios without significantly impacting existing job performance.

resv|scarce|many|llm:qwen2.5:14b.justification: Reserving GPUs would starve current waiting jobs given the scarcity.

resv|scarce|many|llm:qwen2.5:3b.justification: High contention indicates there is slack in the system, allowing for a heavy reservation to protect incoming prod jobs without over-reserving and risking job starvation.

resv|scarce|none|llm:qwen2.5:14b.justification: No incoming prod jobs and current scarcity make reservation unwarranted.

resv|scarce|none|llm:qwen2.5:3b.justification: The cluster is currently scarce, there are no incoming high-priority jobs to protect, and reserving headroom would not improve the situation.
